name: Template agent core behaviors
description: Deterministic eval cases for the template root agent. Each case pins an expected tool trajectory (exact tool name and args) plus a reference response for ROUGE-1 matching. Author or replay cases interactively with `adk web src`; run the gate with `uv run pytest tests/eval`.

parts.text: Hi, I'm Alex. What is the current time in the America/New_York timezone?
Hi Alex! The current time in America/New_York is 10:30 PM on Thursday.
